task_description: Create all 10 LLM usage disclosure JSON files in the required format with Part B additional fields

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding the additional Part B fields required in every LLM JSON file
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What additional fields does Part B require in each LLM interaction entry compared to Part A? What are the exact field names and allowed values?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Claude clarified that three new fields are required: task_tag (string indicating the task), code_used_verbatim (boolean), and student_modification (required when code_used_verbatim=true). Also confirmed that top_5_prompts must be drawn from interactions in that specific file only.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I re-read the Task 4.2 rubric carefully and confirmed Claude's interpretation was correct. I also noted that files for tasks with fewer than 5 interactions should include all of them rather than padding to exactly 5.

top_5_prompts.prompt_summary: Clarify the three additional Part B fields: task_tag, code_used_verbatim, student_modification
top_5_prompts.why_most_useful: Ensured I understood the exact field requirements before generating any files, preventing structural errors.

top_5_prompts.prompt_summary: Confirm top_5_prompts must be drawn from interactions in the same file only
top_5_prompts.why_most_useful: Clarified a potential ambiguity in the rubric that would have caused structural errors if misunderstood.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Task 4.2 of Part B.
